summary: Admin Panel Mobile Responsive Layout Testing Complete - All three reported tabs (VIP-Auktionen, Großkunden B2B, Gutscheine) now display correctly on mobile with card-based layouts. No cut-off tables or hidden buttons observed.

issues: Translation key 'admin.manageVouchers' showing instead of translated text - minor i18n issue not related to mobile layout

vip_auktionen_mobile.details: Mobile card view (md:hidden) displays correctly with: Product image with VIP badge, VIP tag, Status badge (Aktiv/Beendet), Product name, UVP price, Stats grid (Preis, Bot-Ziel with AKTIV indicator, Gebote), Action buttons (Bot, Auto, extend, end, remove VIP). All information visible without cut-off.

grosskunden_b2b_mobile.details: Open applications section displays properly on mobile with: Company name, Contact person, Email, Phone, Expected volume (amber colored), Message/notes, Full-width 'Freischalten' button (green) and reject X button. Buttons NOT cut off - displayed with proper width.

gutscheine_mobile.details: Mobile card view displays correctly with: Voucher code (pink monospace), Aktiv status badge, Stats grid (Typ, Wert, Genutzt), Action buttons (Deaktivieren, Delete). All columns visible without cut-off.

responsive_css_verification.details: Found 4 elements with md:hidden class (mobile card views) and 2 elements with hidden md:block class (desktop tables) on VIP-Auktionen page. Responsive CSS working correctly.

seed_data_creation: None - used existing admin account and test data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin panel mobile responsive layouts tested at 390x844 viewport (iPhone 14 Pro). All three tabs (VIP-Auktionen, Großkunden B2B, Gutscheine) use md:hidden for mobile card views and hidden md:block for desktop table views. Mobile navigation: Click 'Menü' button at top to see all admin tabs. Cookie consent banner may need to be dismissed first. Maintenance mode was enabled during testing - disabled via API call to /api/maintenance/toggle?enabled=false with admin token.
